tools.name: outlook_calendar_list_events
tools.description: List upcoming Outlook Calendar events within a date range. Returns event summaries, times, and metadata.

calendar_id.description: Calendar ID to query. If omitted, uses the default calendar.

time_min.description: Start of time range in ISO 8601 format (e.g. "2024-01-15T00:00:00Z"). Defaults to now.

time_max.description: End of time range in ISO 8601 format (e.g. "2024-01-22T00:00:00Z"). Defaults to 7 days from now.

max_results.description: Maximum number of events to return (default 25, max 250)

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Outlook accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: outlook_calendar_get_event
tools.description: Get the full details of a single Outlook Calendar event by its ID.

calendar_id.description: Calendar ID. If omitted, uses the default calendar.

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Outlook accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: outlook_calendar_create_event
tools.description: Create a new Outlook Calendar event. Include a confidence score (0-1) indicating how certain you are this action is correct.

summary.description: Event title (maps to the Outlook subject field)

start.description: Start time in ISO 8601 format (e.g. "2024-01-15T09:00:00-05:00") or date for all-day events ("2024-01-15")

end.description: End time in ISO 8601 format or date for all-day events

attendees.description: Email addresses of attendees to invite

timezone.description: IANA timezone (e.g. "America/New_York"). Required when start/end don't include timezone offset.

calendar_id.description: Calendar ID. If omitted, uses the default calendar.

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Outlook accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: outlook_calendar_check_availability
tools.description: Check free/busy status across one or more schedules to find available time slots.

time_min.description: Start of time range in ISO 8601 format

time_max.description: End of time range in ISO 8601 format

schedules.description: Email addresses of schedules to check. Defaults to the authenticated user.

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Outlook accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: outlook_calendar_rsvp
tools.description: Respond to an Outlook Calendar event invitation (accept, decline, or tentative). Include a confidence score (0-1).

calendar_id.description: Calendar ID. If omitted, uses the default calendar.

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Outlook accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called
